message:
feat(abi): replace direct libc dl* calls with versioned host delegation, expand fallback alloc table, and harden runtime policy init

dlfcn host delegation (dlfcn_abi.rs):
- Add host_delegate! macro that lazily resolves host glibc symbols via
  dlvsym_next, trying GLIBC_2.34 → GLIBC_2.2.5 → GLIBC_2.17 fallback
  chain. Uses AtomicPtr for lock-free caching after first resolution.
- Replace all direct libc::dlopen/dlsym/dlclose calls with host_dlopen/
  host_dlsym/host_dlclose delegates, avoiding recursive interposition
  when frankenlibc's own dl* symbols shadow the host
- Replace libc_dl_iterate_phdr/libc_dladdr extern declarations with
  host_dl_iterate_phdr/host_dladdr delegates using the same mechanism
- Add set_dlerror_raw for setting thread-local dlerror from raw C strings

Fallback allocation table (malloc_abi.rs):
- Increase FALLBACK_ALLOC_TABLE_SLOTS from 4096 to 262144 to handle
  workloads with many bootstrap/reentrant allocations that bypass the
  membrane arena. The smaller table caused hash collisions and silent
  double-frees under heavy dl* and thread-local initialization loads.

Runtime policy initialization (runtime_policy.rs):
- Change parse_mode_from_environ return type from Option to Result to
  distinguish "env variable not found" (Ok(None)) from "environ pointer
  is null" (Err(())) — the latter indicates early init before libc has
  set up the environment, requiring a different fallback strategy.

Also includes changes to startup_abi.rs, string_abi.rs, and fingerprint.rs
for related ABI hardening.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
